name: bedrock_625k.geojson
description: National bedrock-geology context layer for the explorer, classified to an indicative aquifer potential (Principal / Secondary / Low) from rock composition.
coverage: United Kingdom (England, Wales, Scotland, Isle of Man, Northern Ireland)
licence: Open Government Licence v3.0 (free, commercial use permitted)
attribution: Contains British Geological Survey materials © UKRI [year]. Open Government Licence v3.0.
derivation: scripts/build_bedrock_geology.py — lithology (RCS_D) keyword classification → dissolve by class → simplify (250 m) → reproject EPSG:27700 → WGS84.
note: Indicative aquifer potential derived from rock type — NOT the official EA/BGS Aquifer Designation (which is not OGL/commercial-clean and was retired from this product).
